overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian robes walking through a desert landscape toward a fortified stone city. The character passes through a monumental gate adorned with hieroglyphic carvings and explores the interior mud-brick village streets.

events.description: wild canine or hyena runs across the dirt path from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the distant fortress wall

notable_agents.action: wild dog running across the path from left to right

entered.detail: tall date palm trees lining the right side of the desert path
ancient stone defensive wall with crenellated top
sandy dirt path with visible wagon wheel tracks
dry yellow grass and scrub vegetation covering the desert ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide desert path toward an ancient stone fortress. Tall palm trees line the right side while dry grass covers the sandy ground. A wild dog suddenly runs across the path from the left, and the massive fortress wall grows larger ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortress wall approach to monumental gate

events.description: camel with rider passes by on the right side heading in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the fortress wall approaching the decorated gate entrance

notable_agents.action: camel with rider passing by on the right side of the path

entered.detail: large stone gate structure with decorative crenellated top
carved Egyptian hieroglyphs and figures on the gate facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside the massive stone fortress wall, approaching an ornate gate decorated with hieroglyphic carvings. A camel with a rider passes by on the right, and the path leads directly toward the monumental entrance.

events.description: entering the monumental gate with hieroglyphic carvings covering interior walls
exiting the gate into the sunlit village courtyard beyond

agents.ego_description: walking through the decorated gate passage from the desert exterior into the village interior

notable_agents.action: child running through the gate ahead into the village

entered.detail: open courtyard with mud-brick buildings visible through the gate exit

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shadowed gate passage where hieroglyphic carvings cover the interior walls. Light streams in from the far opening revealing a village courtyard beyond. A child runs past through the gate ahead as the character emerges from the enclosed passage.

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow dirt streets between mud-brick buildings

entered.detail: tan mud-brick residential walls and structures lining the alley
narrow winding dirt alleyway between mud-brick buildings
large stone temple facade visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character explores the interior village, walking through narrow dirt alleys between tan mud-brick buildings. Palm trees rise above the walls, and a large ancient temple structure becomes visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a wide, sun-drenched desert path into the enclosed heart of an ancient fortified village. It begins with the character walking along a sandy trail lined with palm trees and dry grass, where a wild dog darts across the path as a massive stone fortress looms ahead. As the camera tracks alongside the towering fortress wall, a rider on a camel passes by before the path leads directly into an ornate gate adorned with hieroglyphic carvings. The scene then shifts into the cool shadows of the gate passage, where light streams from the far opening and a child runs past as the character emerges into a village courtyard. Finally, the movement flows through narrow dirt alleys between tan mud-brick buildings, passing under towering palms toward a large ancient temple visible in the distance.
